notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly grounds into a double play, second baseman Matt McLain to shortstop Elly De La Cruz to first baseman Spencer Steer. Seiya Suzuki scores. Michael Busch out at 2nd. Carson Kelly out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, second baseman Matt McLain to shortstop Elly De La Cruz to first baseman Spencer Steer. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 3rd. Dansby Swanson out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner grounds into a double play, second baseman Matt McLain to shortstop Elly De La Cruz to first baseman Spencer Steer. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 3rd. Dansby Swanson out at 2nd. Nico Hoerner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto grounds out to first baseman Spencer Steer.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Brock Burke to second baseman Matt McLain. Nico Hoerner to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Busch walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch walks. Nico Hoerner scores. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Colin Rea on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Stephenson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson singles on a ground ball to left fielder Ian Happ. Will Benson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Ke'Bryan Hayes to 3rd. Blake Dunn out at 2nd. Spencer Steer out at 1st.
